title: Wii Sports Music Disc Pack
description: Nintendo Music Disc Series: VOLUME III
body:
This Data and Resource Pack collection adds 16 craftable music discs from Wii Sports.

### TRACKLIST
All track names are sourced from the Nintendo Music app.
- Title Theme
- Main Menu
- Learning to Play
- Tennis: Player Selection
- Tennis: Results
- Baseball: Taking the Field
- Baseball: Results
- Bowling: The Alley
- Bowling: Results
- Golf: Course Selection
- Golf: Results
- Boxing: Results
- Boxing: Training
- Training: Lesson Selection
- Training: Earning a Medal
- Wii Fitness: Menu

DISCLAIMER: Due to this game not having an official soundtrack release outside of Nintendo Music, song length and audio quality may not 100% reflect how it appears on the app.

### CRAFTING GUIDE
A smithing table is required to obtain discs added in these packs. The recipes are displayed in the Advancements tab, which unlocks when you obtain any Music Disc and a Stone Sword. The Advancement tab shows a checklist of each song with the required *"addition"* item needed to obtain it as the Advancement icon.
